name: Private Containment CEO
description:
At an undisclosed location in Greenland you administrate the massive Cypher Isolation Corporation (CYCorp for short). Keep the shareholders happy while avoiding the apocalypse.

Cyphers are items, people and othe phoenomena that ignore the known laws of physics. Your work as the CEO of CYCorp entails:

  • Closing deals with countries to capture problematic Cyphers.

  • Successful containment of Cyphers.

  • Selling research to other corporations and governments based on Cypher research.

  • KEEP SHAREHOLDERS HAPPY

  • AVOID THE APOCALYPSE

(Inspired by SCP, and similar works, obviously)

Keywords: CEO, management sim, manager, anomalies, anomaly, lab, research.
creator: hitpun
